Class JsonSchemaProperty.JsonSchemaPropertyBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.schema.JsonSchemaProperty.JsonSchemaPropertyBuilder
Enclosing interface:
JsonSchemaProperty
public static class JsonSchemaProperty.JsonSchemaPropertyBuilder extends Object
Builder for IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty.
Since:
2.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty<TypedJsonSchemaObject>
    ofType(@Nullable Class<?> type)
    Configure the JsonSchemaObject.Type for the property by deriving it from the given type.

    Configure a JsonSchemaObject.Type for the property.

  • Method Details

    • ofType

      public IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty<TypedJsonSchemaObject> ofType(JsonSchemaObject.Type type)
      Configure a JsonSchemaObject.Type for the property.
      Parameters:
      type - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty.

    • ofType

      public IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty<TypedJsonSchemaObject> ofType(@Nullable Class<?> type)
      Configure the JsonSchemaObject.Type for the property by deriving it from the given type.
      Parameters:
      type - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty.
      Since:
      2.2

    • with

      public IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty<TypedJsonSchemaObject> with(TypedJsonSchemaObject schemaObject)
      Configure a TypedJsonSchemaObject for the property.
      Parameters:
      schemaObject - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty.

    • withoutType

      public IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty<UntypedJsonSchemaObject> withoutType()
      Returns:
      an untyped IdentifiableJsonSchemaProperty.
